Login.title: Login
Login.name: Name

AdminHeader.uploadDesc: Supports single, LivePhoto, and batch uploads.
AdminHeader.listDesc: Supports filtering, sorting, batch actions, and quick editing.
AdminHeader.albumDesc: Create, edit, and organize album display order.
AdminHeader.tagsDesc: Manage primary/secondary tags for frontend filtering and backend archival.
AdminHeader.storagesDesc: Configure object storage services and access parameters.
AdminHeader.accountDesc: Update avatar URL and login password.
AdminHeader.preferencesDesc: Manage site info, display options, RSS, and About page configuration.
AdminHeader.authenticatorDesc: Enable or disable TOTP verification to strengthen admin security.
AdminHeader.preferencesHint: Finish basic info and display settings first, then configure the About section.

Passkey.title: Passkey Management
Passkey.description: Passkey provides a secure, convenient passwordless login method using biometric authentication or device PIN on your device.
Passkey.nameHint: Give your Passkey an easily recognizable name, like "My Phone" or "Office Computer"
Passkey.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Passkey? This action cannot be undone.
Passkey.registerError: An error occurred during Passkey registration
Passkey.loginRequiredForRegister: Please log in before registering a Passkey
Passkey.enterEmailFirst: Please enter your email address first
Passkey.loginCancelled: Passkey verification cancelled, please try again
Passkey.loginNotFound: No matching Passkey found, please confirm you have registered a Passkey for this email
Passkey.loginTimeout: Passkey verification timed out, please try again
Passkey.loginInUse: This Passkey is already in use elsewhere, please try again
Passkey.loginNotSupported: Your device or browser does not support Passkey
Passkey.loginError: An error occurred during Passkey login, please try again
Passkey.keepAtLeastOne: Ensure you keep at least one Passkey or other login method to prevent losing access to your account.
Passkey.noPasskeysDescription: You haven't registered any Passkeys yet. Click the button above to register your first Passkey.
Passkey.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this Passkey? This action cannot be undone.
Passkey.tipDescription: Ensure you keep at least one Passkey or other login method to prevent losing access to your account.

Tips.reallyDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Tips.downloadStart: Starting download, the original image is large, please be patient!

Tips.imageWidthRequired: Image width cannot be empty and must be greater than 0!

Tips.cloudRemoteOriginOrPreviewMissing: Remote original or preview image does not exist. Please re-select files and upload again before submitting.
Tips.remoteOriginOrPreviewMissing: Remote original or preview image does not exist. Please re-select files and upload again before submitting.
Tips.switchToS3Info: Switched to Amazon S3. No need to choose a directory; please select an album first.
Tips.cloudRemoteVideoAnomalyRetryFailed: Remote video file anomaly detected. Auto re-upload failed. Please retry after re-uploading this video.
Tips.remoteVideoMissing: Remote video does not exist. Please re-select the video and upload again before submitting.
Tips.selectStorageAndAlbumWithAListDirectory: Please select storage and album (including AList directory).

AdminAnalytics.title: Analytics Overview
AdminAnalytics.subtitle: Key metrics and trends for today and the last 7 days (auto refresh every 5 minutes)
AdminAnalytics.empty: No analytics data yet. Trends will appear after traffic is recorded.

Upload.uploadTips1: Click to upload file or drag file here
Upload.uploadTips2: Vercel and other platforms Free subscription limit upload size to 6M.
Upload.uploadTips4: Maximum {count} files can be uploaded at once
Upload.modeDescSingleton: Single mode: ideal for precise EXIF and tag editing before upload.
Upload.modeDescLivephoto: LivePhoto mode: upload image and video together as one item.
Upload.modeDescMultiple: Multiple mode: ideal for bulk import with auto upload and batch tags.
Upload.dragOrClickVideo: Drag or click to upload video
Upload.uploadTipsSingle: Drag or click to upload (max 1 file)
Upload.title: Image Title
Upload.indexTag: Please enter image index tag, e.g., cat, do not enter special characters.
Upload.selectUploadMode: Please select upload mode, default is single file upload
Upload.submitButtonHint: Click submit: it will first upload unfinished files, then save metadata.
Upload.submitWithAutoUpload: Submit (will first upload unfinished files, then save metadata)
Upload.exifOptionalLabel: EXIF (optional: choose common values or fill manually)
Upload.referenceExifToastSuccess: EXIF extracted from reference image (reference not uploaded)
Upload.referenceExifToastError: No valid EXIF found in the reference image or parsing failed
Upload.duplicateImageContent: This image already exists. Do you want to continue saving? (It may reuse the existing record.)
Upload.secondaryTagPlaceholderSelectPrimary: Please select a primary tag first
Upload.fileNotUploadedBody: Detected files not yet uploaded. Click "Upload selected and submit" to upload the selected files first, then submit metadata.
Upload.singleFileNotUploadedBody: The current file has not been uploaded yet. After uploading, save the metadata.
Upload.exifInfoPartiallyMissingHint: EXIF info (if partially missing, you can fill it in here)
Upload.originNotUploadedHint: Original image not uploaded. You'll be prompted to upload (or auto-uploaded) before submitting.
Upload.presetTagsClickAddRemoveHint: Preset tags (click to add / click again to remove)
Upload.exifInfoMissingHint: EXIF info (if missing, select from dropdown or enter manually)
Upload.tagCategoryHeading: Tag category (choose a primary category and select sub-tags below)
Upload.exifCameraModelManualPlaceholder: Choose from suggestions or type the camera model directly

Password.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters!
Password.passwordMismatch: The two new passwords do not match!

Account.inputEmail: Please enter the new email address.

Config.region: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Region, e.g., oss-cn-hongkong
Config.endpoint: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Endpoint, e.g., oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com
Config.bucket: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Bucket name, e.g., xphotos
Config.storage_folder: Storage folder (S3), strict format, e.g., xphotos or xphotos/images, leave empty or / for root path
Config.force_path_style: Whether to force the client to use path-based addressing for buckets.
Config.s3_cdn: Whether to enable S3 CDN mode, the path will return the cdn address.
Config.s3_direct_download: Whether to enable S3 direct link download mode.
Config.r2_direct_download: Whether to enable R2 direct link download mode.
Config.r2_storage_folder: Storage folder (Cloudflare R2). Strict format (e.g., xphotos or xphotos/images). Use '/' or leave blank for root path
